subcodes.first_line: O servant of God, render thanks unto His Divine Oneness that thou hast been gathered beneath the shade of the Tree of the Covenant [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده الهی شکر حضرت احدیت که در ظل شجره میثاق محشور گشتی
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for protection, @spiritual transformation, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @firmness in the Covenant
